title: Ice Cream Spoon Stainless Steel Dual-use ice Cream Spoon Scoop Multifunctional ice Cream Scoop Scoop ice Cream Fruit Spoon (Small Size)
features: Excellent Material: Made of high-quality stainless steel, sturdy and durable, not easy to rust, ensuring safe and long-lasting use.
Pressing design: Innovative pressing operation, easy and convenient to scoop ice cream, labor-saving and efficient, even beginners can scoop out round balls.
Practical design: The excavated ice cream balls are full and round, enhancing the appearance of desserts and adapting to various dessert making and plating needs.
Diverse scenarios: Not only for digging ice cream, but also for digging fruit balls, ice cream, etc. It is versatile and practical for kitchen and family gatherings.
Easy to clean: The stainless steel surface is smooth, easy to clean, can be washed with water or simply wiped, does not accumulate dirt and stains, and maintains hygiene.
